item.title: BraekerCTF 2024 - Messengesus 1
BraekerCTF 2024 - Block construction
item.description: “Sir, sir! This is a construction site.” You look up at what you thought was a building being constructed, but you realize it is a construction bot. “Sir please move aside. I had to have these blocks in order since last week, but some newbie construction bot shuffled them.” “I can move aside, " you tell the bot, “but I might be able to help you out.” Source code import binascii from Crypto.

item.title: All my cramptés
item.description: Links I like URL longener Dark souls images maker CLI mega cheatsheet Make your 88x31 Buttons wall Games I play Friday Night Funkin' The binding of Isaac: repentance Super Smash Flash Brawlhalla Pokemon Trading Card Game Live $olitary (Roblox drift game) Assetto Corsa (plan to buy) Bomb rush cyberfunk (plan to buy)

item.title: Projects
item.description: Personal Nothing to see here for the moment… School Expert in data, network and system security | École2600 | 2023 - 2026 Nothing to see here for the moment… French BTEC higher apprenticeship equivalent in IT | Ensitech | 2021 - 2023 TLDR: Building a company network with class homies Coding a portfolio (which is today down and replaced by this minimalist website)

item.title: Whoami
item.description: Actually student in computer science and cybersecurity at Ecole 2600 and play with my CTF team 0xA28. I spend my time learning new things, code clashing and also skateboarding. I like sexy JDM cars and am a drift enthusiaist. I’m also interested in automobile cybersecurity (haven’t started learning this tho). “No need to worry, there’s still time” Whatilike Artemis Skateboarding Jazz and liquid DNB and sometimes listening to both Cryptography challenges Maths Unordered lists

item.title: Flag
item.description: [nofake] Peace in the world canceled by (Ri)cha(r)d Watterson: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-VgEVCJ-TCI&t=203s

item.title: BluehensCTF 2023- Least Significant Color
item.description: Bluehens CTF 2023 - Least significant color CTFtime I can’t decide which color is the least significant… red xor green? -azroberts So for this challenge we got an image file provided encoded.png. All we have to know is in the title AND in the description. Before giving the solution, we need to have in mind two things: Least significant bit (LSB) and the representation of an image. Reminder Images An image is basically a 2D list of tuples (R=red, G=green, B=blue) of 3 values.
